name: Louis Chauvin
abstract: Louis Chauvin (March 13, 1881 – March 26, 1908) was an American ragtime pianist and composer.

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Shoffner
about_quotes.evidence: I don't remember Louis Chauvin. He could have been around there, but I didn't remember that.

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Burton
about_quotes.evidence: Do you remember Louis Chauvin by any chance? I don't remember Louis Chauvin.
